'''Kessendra Stadium''' was a large open-air sports arena located on the edge of the capital city of [[Kessendra]] on the planet [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Access to the stadium could be gained by one of two main thoroughfares, [[Spice Mines Avenue]] and [[Slave Lord Boulevard]]. The Stadium was frequently used to sponsor gladiatorial war games. [[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]] from the Kesselian [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|mines]] were forced to participate in lethal combat, while [[Gambling/Legends|gamblers]] from all across the galaxy placed huge wagers on the outcome.

[[5 ABY/Legends|Five years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], members of the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]] used the stadium as a platform to consolidate their power and promote a new heir to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Members of the [[Senate Planetary Intelligence Network]] learned of this secret meeting and sent a disguised [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to Kessel on a fact-finding [[Mission to Kessel (Trioculus affair)|mission]].

At the secret Imperial convention, [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bertroff Hissa]] presented, [[Trioculus]], the mutant "son" of the late [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to the masses. Trioculus declared himself the rightful ruler of the Empire and demonstrated his power by blasting a critical [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] and [[Unidentified Royal Guard|Royal Guard]] with a lethal dose of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].
